title: Rename device - UI, device doesn't support
scenario: Device Name setting incorrectly appears in Device Settings > General for devices that do not support renaming
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that does NOT support renaming (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200, Poly Voyager 4320, or any device not in the supported list).
4. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
6. Observe whether a "Device Name" option is displayed in the General settings menu.
expected: The "Device Name" option should NOT appear in Device Settings > General for devices that do not support renaming.
